name: project-knowledge-agent
author: ProjectVault
description: Desktop-first project knowledge base Agent with local RAG, chat history, model switching, admin views, and Docker deployment.

scripts.build:backend: .\.venv\Scripts\pyinstaller --noconfirm --clean --onefile --name projectvault-backend --paths backend --collect-submodules app --hidden-import uvicorn.loops.auto --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.http.auto --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.websockets.auto --distpath dist\backend --workpath build\pyinstaller --specpath build\pyinstaller backend\run_backend.py
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --dir && npm run build:installer
scripts.build:desktop:unpacked: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --dir
